message:
feat: show orbit maintenance status on deployment missions card (#5296)

When a deployment mission is "In Orbit" and has an associated orbit
maintenance mission, the card now shows a small indicator below the
progress bar: cadence (daily/weekly/monthly), last run result
(success/warning/failure), and overdue flag.

Cross-references AI orbit missions by project name to match against
deploy missions in the card.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
